faqs.a: We offer 30-day returns on unworn items with tags attached. Contact us to initiate a return.
Standard shipping: 5-7 business days. Express: 2-3 business days within UAE.
Yes, we ship to most countries. International delivery typically takes 7-14 business days.

faqs.q: How can I track my order?
faqs.a: Once shipped, you'll receive a tracking link via email. You can also check your order status in your account.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept major credit cards, Tabby, and Cash on Delivery (UAE only).
